skills: npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill vercel-react-best-practices --skill vercel-composition-patterns --skill web-design-guidelines
npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design --skill webapp-testing
mcps: claude mcp add next-devtools -- npx -y next-devtools-mcp@latest
notes: Next-specific task skills (dev loop, cache components): npx skills add vercel/next.js --list

skills: npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill vercel-react-best-practices --skill vercel-composition-patterns --skill web-design-guidelines
npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design --skill webapp-testing
npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill frontend-design --skill webapp-testing
mcps: claude mcp add --transport http astro-docs https://mcp.docs.astro.build/mcp

notes: No vendor-official skill exists for Express/Fastify/Nest/Hono; use find-skills (see below) if you want to evaluate community ones
Using FastAPI? it ships its own official skill: npx skills add fastapi/fastapi --skill fastapi
Framework knowledge lives in official skills/docs (Next.js bundles its own in node_modules/next/dist/docs and next dev >=16.3 generates agent rules); the kit only pins your project choices

Using Supabase? skills: npx skills add supabase/agent-skills --skill supabase --skill supabase-postgres-best-practices | MCP: claude mcp add --transport http supabase "https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp?project_ref=<ref>"
Browser control for testing/debugging: claude mcp add playwright -- npx -y @playwright/mcp@latest (overlaps with the webapp-testing skill - pick one approach)
Deploying on Vercel? npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-skills --skill deploy-to-vercel
Can't find a skill for your stack? npx skills add vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills teaches the agent to search the registry
Want the full lazy-dev toolchain (audit/review commands)? install the ponytail plugin - base.md already ships the distilled ruleset
